title: Field Notebook Excerpt
summary: Handwritten notes describing marine anomalies and concern about falsified reports.
content: Mara notes dead zones near the discharge channel, unusual vibration noise from Turbine 3, and the suspicion that the published safety record is incomplete.

title: Harbor CCTV Frame
summary: Frame showing Mara approaching the service road at 20:42.
content: A grainy still captures Mara alone with her satchel near the harbor service road shortly before the disappearance window.

title: Phone Message from Tomas
summary: Message inviting Mara to a late meeting.
content: Tomas asks Mara to meet because he needs to tell her something before she publishes. The message is calm, deliberate, and time-stamped the day before she vanished.

title: Official Missing Person Report
summary: Police report that frames the event as a disappearance and delays the search.
content: The report emphasizes uncertainty, labels the case sensitive, and omits the stronger signs of injury or foul play.

title: Interview Transcript: Jonah Quill
summary: Jonah explains that Mara had publishable material and feared interference.
content: Jonah confirms that Mara had enough material for a story and had started asking how to verify chain of custody before going public.

title: Environmental Photo Set
summary: Dead fish and chemical foam near the discharge channel.
content: The photographs show environmental damage that does not match the public safety messaging from Blackwake.

title: Internal Maintenance Memo
summary: Memo instructing employees not to discuss servicing.
content: Staff are told to refer all questions about night maintenance runs to operations and not to discuss turbine servicing with outside parties.

title: Duplicate Inspection Report A
summary: Safe structural summary that conflicts with the dangerous version.
content: This copy of the inspection report says the turbine remains within safe operating tolerances and requires only routine maintenance.

title: Duplicate Inspection Report B
summary: Dangerous vibration fault and urgent repair warning.
content: This version warns that the turbine could fail under stress and that the harbor channel could be affected if the fault is not addressed immediately.

title: Patrol Car Traffic Camera
summary: Pike's vehicle near Lighthouse Road at 21:11.
content: The traffic frame contradicts Pike's later statement about where he was during the disappearance window.

title: Call Log Snapshot
summary: Metadata showing Elena called Tomas at 21:20.
content: The call lasts forty-seven seconds and lands directly in the middle of the confrontation window, tying Elena to the night of the disappearance.

title: Witness Statement: Iris Fen
summary: Statement describing an argument and two voices near the cliff path.
content: Iris heard the argument carried by the wind from the cliff path and believed there were two men speaking with Mara before the noise stopped.

title: Redacted Witness Statement
summary: Official copy removed the reference to the second male voice.
content: The archive version has a redaction where the second male voice should have been, suggesting the record was altered after the fact.

title: Plant Access Log Export
summary: Suspicious deletion around 22:02.
content: One access entry disappears from the export, and the deletion aligns with the point where the cover-up becomes active rather than passive.

title: Voicemail Draft
summary: Mara says she found the piece that proves intent.
content: The draft voicemail suggests Mara believed she had proof not just of negligence, but of deliberate concealment.

title: Recorder Fragment
summary: Damaged audio with argument, demand for the bag, and a slip noise.
content: The fragment includes a hostile exchange, a demand for the satchel and recorder, and a sharp change in footing consistent with a fall.

title: Cliff Path Forensic Photos
summary: Broken barrier post, blood traces, and no drag marks.
content: The scene suggests a fall followed by movement of the evidence, not a struggle that continued across the ground.

title: Ferry Locker Receipt
summary: Receipt showing Mara created a dead-drop the day before.
content: The receipt proves that Mara expected to deliver material indirectly and that she had already prepared for the possibility of interference.

title: Encrypted Package Partial Decrypt
summary: Recovered bundle of selected Blackwake records and an unfinished cover note.
content: Jonah can open only part of the archive, but the files match Mara's investigative trail and show she was preparing a publishable package.

title: Prior Complaint Archive Gap
summary: One historical safety complaint was removed from police intake.
content: The archive audit shows a gap that predates Mara's disappearance, tying Pike to earlier suppression and strengthening the institutional cover-up theory.
